provenance.panels: ../extractor (extended) reconstructed from raw XNAS.ITCH MBO at 1s; aggregated to cadence in the loader; OFI bit-validated vs 60s panel, book-imbalance NEW
provenance.reuse_note: block bootstrap / IC_IR / Grinold cost / BH from hft_metrics SSoT; aggregation + forward/contemp returns + per-day IC local (_stats.py)

signal_detection_sanity.interpretation: strongly positive OFI contemp IC => the gate detects signal when present; a near-zero predictive IC is then a REAL absence, not a broken harness

verdict_logic: PASS iff some EXECUTABLE cell (cadence>=5s) has >=2 same-sign stocks with (bootstrap CI clears 0 AND Grinold E[ret]>cost AND BH-q<fdr); DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY if only 1s cells pass (signal at the boundary but not retail-executable); else FAIL.
